title: Cloud Cost Management Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on managing cloud infrastructure costs.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Cloud Cost Management'?
options: Correctly tracking and managing exactly how much your project's cloud infrastructure is costing you

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a cloud-cost-management-based workflow for a project?
options: Using budgets and alerts provided by your cloud platform to correctly manage and identify overspending
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
